---
title: "arthur_work"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
install.packages("shiny")
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Create sample data for egg laying analysis
plant_joined 

ui <- page_fillable(
  title = "Larvae Count Correlation Analysis",
  card(
    card_header("Correlation Heatmap: Factors Affecting Larvae Counts"),
    plotOutput("correlation_heatmap", height = "600px")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$correlation_heatmap <- renderPlot({
    # Select only numeric columns for correlation
    numeric_data <- plant_joined %>%
      select(where(is.numeric))
    
    # Calculate correlation matrix
    cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_data, use = "complete.obs")
    
    # Convert to long format using tidyr instead of reshape2
    melted_cor <- as.data.frame(cor_matrix) %>%
      mutate(Var1 = rownames(.)) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = -Var1, names_to = "Var2", values_to = "value")
    
    # Create heatmap
    ggplot(melted_cor, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white") +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), size = 4) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#0571b0",
        mid = "white",
        high = "#ca0020",
        midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-1, 1),
        name = "Correlation"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "Correlation Matrix: Factors Affecting Larvae Counts",
        x = "",
        y = ""
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
      ) +
      coord_fixed()
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```


```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

**Plot of recorded seasonal
```{r}
egg_laying %>% 
  filter(season %in% c("spring", "autumn")) %>% 
  mutate(larvae_success_rate = larvae / n_eggs) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = total_leaf_area, y = larvae_success_rate, color = season)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=T)+
  labs(x = "Total leaf area",y = "Larvae success rate",title="Mapping Larvae success compared to leaf size") +
  theme_minimal() 
```

```{r}
egg_laying %>% 
  filter(season %in% c("spring", "autumn")) %>% 
  mutate(larvae_success_rate = larvae / n_eggs) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  ggplot(mapping=aes(x=total_leaf_area, y=larvae_success_rate))+
  geom_point(mapping=aes(color=season))+
  geom_smooth(mapping=aes(color=season), method="lm", se=T)+
  labs( x = "Surrounding Vegitat",y = "Larvae success rate",
    title = "Larvae Success Rate vs. Vegitation")+
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
egg_laying %>% 
  filter(season %in% c("spring", "autumn")) %>% 
  mutate(larvae_success_rate = larvae / n_eggs) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  ggplot(mapping=aes(x=bare_ground, y=larvae_success_rate))+
  geom_point(mapping=aes(color=season))+
  geom_smooth(mapping=aes(color=season), method="lm", se=T)+
  labs(
    x = "Bare ground (%)",
    y = "Larvae success rate",
    title = "Larvae Success Rate vs. Bare Ground"
  )+
  theme_classic()
```

```{r}
egg_laying %>% 
  filter(season=="spring") %>% 
  mutate(larvae_success_rate = larvae / n_eggs) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  ggplot(mapping=aes(x=bare_ground, y=larvae_success_rate))+
  geom_point(mapping=aes(color=season))+
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=T)
```

```{r}
egg_laying %>% 
  filter(season=="spring") %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  ggplot(mapping=aes(x=bare_ground, y=predicted_n))+
  geom_point(mapping=aes(color=season))+
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=T)
```

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)

# Create sample data for egg laying analysis
set.seed(123)
egg_laying 
)

ui <- page_fillable(
  title = "Larvae Count Correlation Analysis",
  card(
    card_header("Correlation Heatmap: Factors Affecting Larvae Counts"),
    plotOutput("correlation_heatmap", height = "600px")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$correlation_heatmap <- renderPlot({
    # Calculate correlation matrix
    cor_matrix <- cor(egg_laying, use = "complete.obs")
    
    # Melt the correlation matrix for ggplot
    melted_cor <- melt(cor_matrix)
    
    # Create heatmap
    ggplot(melted_cor, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white") +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), size = 4) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#0571b0",
        mid = "white",
        high = "#ca0020",
        midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-1, 1),
        name = "Correlation"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "Correlation Matrix: Factors Affecting Larvae Counts",
        x = "",
        y = ""
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
      ) +
      coord_fixed()
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

```{r}
ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Plant Occupancy by Season",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "autumn"
    )
  ),
  card(
    card_header("Occupancy Distribution"),
    plotOutput("occupancy_plot")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season) %>%
      mutate(occupied = factor(occupied)) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(aes(fill = season.x), color = "black", position = "dodge") +
      labs(
        x = "Occupied",
        y = "Count",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
```{r}
set.seed(123)
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE)
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Plant Occupancy by Season",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "autumn"
    )
  ),
  card(
    card_header("Occupancy Distribution"),
    plotOutput("occupancy_plot")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season) %>%
      mutate(occupied = factor(occupied)) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(aes(fill = season.x), color = "black", position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Occupied",
        y = "Count",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```
```{r}
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(200, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE)
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Plant Data by Season",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "autumn"
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Occupancy Distribution"),
      plotOutput("occupancy_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Soil Temperature Density"),
      plotOutput("temp_soil_plot")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season) %>%
      mutate(occupied = factor(occupied)) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(aes(fill = season.x), color = "black", position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Occupied",
        y = "Count",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, color = season.x, fill = season.x)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature",
        y = "Density",
        color = "Season",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample data that matches your structure
set.seed(123)
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(200, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE)
)

# Custom theme without Google fonts
my_theme <- bs_theme(
  bg = "#f8f9fa",
  fg = "#212529",
  primary = "#0d6efd",
  version = 5
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "🌿 Plant Environmental Analysis Dashboard",
  theme = my_theme,
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 280,
    class = "bg-light",
    h4("Analysis Controls", class = "text-primary"),
    hr(),
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("🍂 Autumn" = "autumn", "🌸 Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "autumn"
    ),
    hr(),
    div(
      class = "p-3 bg-white rounded",
      h6("Dataset Info", class = "text-secondary"),
      p(
        strong("Total Records: "), 
        nrow(plant_joined),
        style = "margin-bottom: 5px;"
      ),
      p(
        strong("Variables: "), 
        "4",
        style = "margin-bottom: 5px;"
      ),
      p(
        strong("Seasons: "), 
        "Autumn, Spring",
        style = "margin-bottom: 0;"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = c(6, 6),
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-primary text-white",
        "Occupancy Distribution by Status"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("occupancy_plot", height = "350px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Bar chart showing occupied vs unoccupied observations"
      )
    ),
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-success text-white",
        "Soil Temperature Distribution"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("temp_soil_plot", height = "350px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Density plot of soil temperature measurements"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = 12,
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm mt-3",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-info text-white",
        "Summary Statistics"
      ),
      card_body(
        tableOutput("summary_table")
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season)
  })
  
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      mutate(
        occupied = factor(occupied, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Unoccupied", "Occupied"))
      ) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied, fill = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(color = "white", linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("Unoccupied" = "#e74c3c", "Occupied" = "#3498db"),
        name = "Status"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Occupancy Status",
        y = "Count",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "Season")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
      )
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, color = season.x, fill = season.x)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1.5) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ecc71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ecc71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Density",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "Soil Temperature Profile")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
  })
  
  output$summary_table <- renderTable({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(occupied) %>%
      summarise(
        Count = n(),
        `Avg Ambient Temp (°C)` = round(mean(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `Avg Soil Temp (°C)` = round(mean(temperature_soil), 2),
        `SD Ambient Temp` = round(sd(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `SD Soil Temp` = round(sd(temperature_soil), 2)
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        occupied = case_when(
          occupied == 0 ~ "Unoccupied",
          occupied == 1 ~ "Occupied"
        )
      ) %>%
      rename(`Occupancy Status` = occupied)
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample data that matches your structure with spatial coordinates
set.seed(123)
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(200, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE),
  latitude = runif(200, min = 40, max = 45),
  longitude = runif(200, min = -75, max = -70)
)

# Custom theme without Google fonts
my_theme <- bs_theme(
  bg = "#f8f9fa",
  fg = "#212529",
  primary = "#0d6efd",
  version = 5
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "🌿 Plant Environmental Analysis Dashboard",
  theme = my_theme,
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 280,
    class = "bg-light",
    h4("Analysis Controls", class = "text-primary"),
    hr(),
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("🍂 Autumn" = "autumn", "🌸 Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "autumn"
    ),
    hr(),
    selectInput(
      "temp_var",
      "Temperature Variable for Heatmap:",
      choices = c("Ambient Temperature" = "temperature_ambient",
                  "Soil Temperature" = "temperature_soil"),
      selected = "temperature_ambient"
    ),
    hr(),
    div(
      class = "p-3 bg-white rounded",
      h6("Dataset Info", class = "text-secondary"),
      p(
        strong("Total Records: "), 
        nrow(plant_joined),
        style = "margin-bottom: 5px;"
      ),
      p(
        strong("Variables: "), 
        "6",
        style = "margin-bottom: 5px;"
      ),
      p(
        strong("Seasons: "), 
        "Autumn, Spring",
        style = "margin-bottom: 0;"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = c(6, 6),
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-primary text-white",
        "Occupancy Distribution by Status"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("occupancy_plot", height = "350px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Bar chart showing occupied vs unoccupied observations"
      )
    ),
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-success text-white",
        "Soil Temperature Distribution"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("temp_soil_plot", height = "350px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Density plot of soil temperature measurements"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = 12,
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm mt-3",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-danger text-white",
        "Spatial Temperature Heatmap"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("heatmap_plot", height = "450px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Geographic distribution of temperature measurements"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = 12,
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm mt-3",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-info text-white",
        "Summary Statistics"
      ),
      card_body(
        tableOutput("summary_table")
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season)
  })
  
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      mutate(
        occupied = factor(occupied, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Unoccupied", "Occupied"))
      ) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied, fill = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(color = "white", linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("Unoccupied" = "#e74c3c", "Occupied" = "#3498db"),
        name = "Status"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Occupancy Status",
        y = "Count",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "Season")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
      )
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, color = season.x, fill = season.x)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1.5) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ecc71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ecc71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Density",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "Soil Temperature Profile")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
  })
  
  output$heatmap_plot <- renderPlot({
    temp_label <- ifelse(input$temp_var == "temperature_ambient", 
                         "Ambient Temperature (°C)", 
                         "Soil Temperature (°C)")
    
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = longitude, y = latitude)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = .data[[input$temp_var]]), size = 4, alpha = 0.7) +
      scale_color_gradient2(
        low = "#3498db",
        mid = "#f39c12",
        high = "#e74c3c",
        midpoint = mean(filtered_data()[[input$temp_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
        name = temp_label
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Longitude",
        y = "Latitude",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "-", temp_label, "Spatial Distribution")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90")
      )
  })
  
  output$summary_table <- renderTable({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(occupied) %>%
      summarise(
        Count = n(),
        `Avg Ambient Temp (°C)` = round(mean(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `Avg Soil Temp (°C)` = round(mean(temperature_soil), 2),
        `SD Ambient Temp` = round(sd(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `SD Soil Temp` = round(sd(temperature_soil), 2)
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        occupied = case_when(
          occupied == 0 ~ "Unoccupied",
          occupied == 1 ~ "Occupied"
        )
      ) %>%
      rename(`Occupancy Status` = occupied)
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```
```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample data with leaf height and sward height
set.seed(123)
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(200, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE),
  leaf_height = rnorm(200, mean = 15, sd = 3),
  sward_height = rnorm(200, mean = 10, sd = 2.5)
)

# Create simple linear models for prediction
leaf_model <- lm(leaf_height ~ temperature_soil, data = plant_joined)
sward_model <- lm(sward_height ~ temperature_soil, data = plant_joined)

# Custom theme without Google fonts
my_theme <- bs_theme(
  bg = "#f8f9fa",
  fg = "#212529",
  primary = "#0d6efd",
  version = 5
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "🌿 Plant Environmental Analysis Dashboard",
  theme = my_theme,
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 280,
    class = "bg-light",
    h4("Analysis Controls", class = "text-primary"),
    hr(),
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("🍂 Autumn" = "autumn", "🌸 Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "autumn"
    ),
    hr(),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_prediction",
      "Ground Temperature for Prediction (°C):",
      min = 5,
      max = 30,
      value = 18,
      step = 0.5
    ),
    hr(),
    div(
      class = "p-3 bg-white rounded",
      h6("Dataset Info", class = "text-secondary"),
      p(
        strong("Total Records: "), 
        nrow(plant_joined),
        style = "margin-bottom: 5px;"
      ),
      p(
        strong("Variables: "), 
        "6",
        style = "margin-bottom: 5px;"
      ),
      p(
        strong("Seasons: "), 
        "Autumn, Spring",
        style = "margin-bottom: 0;"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = c(6, 6),
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-primary text-white",
        "Occupancy Distribution by Status"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("occupancy_plot", height = "350px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Bar chart showing occupied vs unoccupied observations"
      )
    ),
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-success text-white",
        "Soil Temperature Distribution"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("temp_soil_plot", height = "350px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Density plot of soil temperature measurements"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = 12,
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm mt-3",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-warning text-dark",
        "Height Predictions Based on Ground Temperature"
      ),
      card_body(
        plotOutput("prediction_plot", height = "450px")
      ),
      card_footer(
        class = "text-muted small",
        "Predicted leaf and sward heights based on soil temperature with regression lines"
      )
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    col_widths = 12,
    card(
      class = "shadow-sm mt-3",
      card_header(
        class = "bg-info text-white",
        "Summary Statistics"
      ),
      card_body(
        tableOutput("summary_table")
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == input$season)
  })
  
  predicted_values <- reactive({
    leaf_pred <- predict(leaf_model, newdata = data.frame(temperature_soil = input$temp_prediction))
    sward_pred <- predict(sward_model, newdata = data.frame(temperature_soil = input$temp_prediction))
    
    data.frame(
      Variable = c("Leaf Height", "Sward Height"),
      Predicted_Value = c(leaf_pred, sward_pred)
    )
  })
  
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      mutate(
        occupied = factor(occupied, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Unoccupied", "Occupied"))
      ) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied, fill = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(color = "white", linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("Unoccupied" = "#e74c3c", "Occupied" = "#3498db"),
        name = "Status"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Occupancy Status",
        y = "Count",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "Season")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
      )
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, color = season.x, fill = season.x)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 1.5) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ecc71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ecc71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Density",
        title = paste(tools::toTitleCase(input$season), "Soil Temperature Profile")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
  })
  
  output$prediction_plot <- renderPlot({
    pred_data <- filtered_data()
    pred_vals <- predicted_values()
    
    # Create prediction point data
    pred_point <- data.frame(
      temperature_soil = rep(input$temp_prediction, 2),
      height = pred_vals$Predicted_Value,
      variable = pred_vals$Variable
    )
    
    # Combine data for both variables
    plot_data <- bind_rows(
      pred_data %>% 
        select(temperature_soil, leaf_height) %>% 
        rename(height = leaf_height) %>%
        mutate(variable = "Leaf Height"),
      pred_data %>% 
        select(temperature_soil, sward_height) %>% 
        rename(height = sward_height) %>%
        mutate(variable = "Sward Height")
    )
    
    ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = temperature_soil, y = height, color = variable)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 2) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
      geom_point(data = pred_point, aes(x = temperature_soil, y = height, color = variable),
                 size = 6, shape = 18) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = input$temp_prediction, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("Leaf Height" = "#2ecc71", "Sward Height" = "#9b59b6"),
        name = "Measurement"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Ground Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Height (cm)",
        title = paste("Height Predictions at", input$temp_prediction, "°C"),
        subtitle = paste("Leaf:", round(pred_vals$Predicted_Value[1], 2), "cm | Sward:", 
                        round(pred_vals$Predicted_Value[2], 2), "cm")
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, color = "gray30"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
  })
  
  output$summary_table <- renderTable({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(occupied) %>%
      summarise(
        Count = n(),
        `Avg Ambient Temp (°C)` = round(mean(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `Avg Soil Temp (°C)` = round(mean(temperature_soil), 2),
        `Avg Leaf Height (cm)` = round(mean(leaf_height), 2),
        `Avg Sward Height (cm)` = round(mean(sward_height), 2)
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        occupied = case_when(
          occupied == 0 ~ "Unoccupied",
          occupied == 1 ~ "Occupied"
        )
      ) %>%
      rename(`Occupancy Status` = occupied)
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample data that matches your structure
set.seed(123)
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(200, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE)
)

ui <- page_fillable(
  title = "Plant Data Slideshow",
  card(
    card_header(
      "Plant Data Exploration",
      class = "d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center"
    ),
    card_body(
      min_height = "500px",
      uiOutput("slide_content")
    ),
    card_footer(
      class = "d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center",
      div(
        actionButton("prev_slide", "← Previous", class = "btn-primary"),
        actionButton("next_slide", "Next →", class = "btn-primary")
      ),
      div(
        textOutput("slide_counter"),
        style = "font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px;"
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  # Reactive value to track current slide
  current_slide <- reactiveVal(1)
  total_slides <- 4
  
  # Previous slide
  observeEvent(input$prev_slide, {
    new_slide <- current_slide() - 1
    if (new_slide < 1) new_slide <- total_slides
    current_slide(new_slide)
  })
  
  # Next slide
  observeEvent(input$next_slide, {
    new_slide <- current_slide() + 1
    if (new_slide > total_slides) new_slide <- 1
    current_slide(new_slide)
  })
  
  # Slide counter
  output$slide_counter <- renderText({
    paste("Slide", current_slide(), "of", total_slides)
  })
  
  # Slide content
  output$slide_content <- renderUI({
    slide_num <- current_slide()
    
    if (slide_num == 1) {
      # Slide 1: Occupancy by Season
      tagList(
        h3("Occupancy Distribution by Season"),
        layout_columns(
          plotOutput("occupancy_autumn", height = "400px"),
          plotOutput("occupancy_spring", height = "400px")
        )
      )
    } else if (slide_num == 2) {
      # Slide 2: Soil Temperature Density
      tagList(
        h3("Soil Temperature Distribution"),
        plotOutput("temp_soil_both", height = "450px")
      )
    } else if (slide_num == 3) {
      # Slide 3: Ambient Temperature Density
      tagList(
        h3("Ambient Temperature Distribution"),
        plotOutput("temp_ambient_both", height = "450px")
      )
    } else {
      # Slide 4: Summary Statistics
      tagList(
        h3("Summary Statistics"),
        layout_columns(
          card(
            card_header("Autumn Statistics"),
            tableOutput("autumn_summary")
          ),
          card(
            card_header("Spring Statistics"),
            tableOutput("spring_summary")
          )
        )
      )
    }
  })
  
  # Slide 1 plots
  output$occupancy_autumn <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == "autumn") %>%
      mutate(occupied = factor(occupied)) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(aes(fill = season.x), color = "black", position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E")) +
      labs(title = "Autumn", x = "Occupied", y = "Count", fill = "Season") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
  
  output$occupancy_spring <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      filter(season.x == "spring") %>%
      mutate(occupied = factor(occupied)) %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied)) +
      geom_bar(aes(fill = season.x), color = "black", position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("spring" = "#90EE90")) +
      labs(title = "Spring", x = "Occupied", y = "Count", fill = "Season") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
  
  # Slide 2 plot
  output$temp_soil_both <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, color = season.x, fill = season.x)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")) +
      labs(x = "Soil Temperature", y = "Density", color = "Season", fill = "Season") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 16))
  })
  
  # Slide 3 plot
  output$temp_ambient_both <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>% 
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_ambient, color = season.x, fill = season.x)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")) +
      labs(x = "Ambient Temperature", y = "Density", color = "Season", fill = "Season") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 16))
  })
  
  # Slide 4 tables
  output$autumn_summary <- renderTable({
    plant_joined %>%
      filter(season.x == "autumn") %>%
      summarise(
        `Occupancy Rate` = paste0(round(mean(occupied) * 100, 1), "%"),
        `Avg Soil Temp` = round(mean(temperature_soil), 2),
        `Avg Ambient Temp` = round(mean(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `Sample Size` = n()
      ) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE)
  
  output$spring_summary <- renderTable({
    plant_joined %>%
      filter(season.x == "spring") %>%
      summarise(
        `Occupancy Rate` = paste0(round(mean(occupied) * 100, 1), "%"),
        `Avg Soil Temp` = round(mean(temperature_soil), 2),
        `Avg Ambient Temp` = round(mean(temperature_ambient), 2),
        `Sample Size` = n()
      ) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE)
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
```{r}

```
```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Assumes you have already loaded your data as egg_laying
# If not, uncomment and modify the line below:
# egg_laying <- read.csv("your_data_file.csv")

# For demonstration, creating sample data structure
# Replace this with your actual egg_laying dataset
set.seed(123)
egg_laying

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "🦋 Butterfly Breeding Optimizer",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    h4("Breeding Parameters"),
    sliderInput(
      "weight_range",
      "Weight Range:",
      min = floor(min(egg_laying$n_weights)),
      max = ceiling(max(egg_laying$n_weights)),
      value = c(floor(min(egg_laying$n_weights)), ceiling(max(egg_laying$n_weights))),
      step = 1
    ),
    selectInput(
      "species_filter",
      "Species:",
      choices = c("All", unique(egg_laying$species)),
      selected = "All"
    ),
    selectInput(
      "season_filter",
      "Season:",
      choices = c("All", unique(egg_laying$season)),
      selected = "All"
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "plant_range",
      "Plant ID Range:",
      min = min(egg_laying$plant_id),
      max = max(egg_laying$plant_id),
      value = c(min(egg_laying$plant_id), max(egg_laying$plant_id)),
      step = 1
    ),
    hr(),
    h4("Optimization Metrics"),
    valueBoxOutput("avg_eggs", width = "100%"),
    valueBoxOutput("avg_larvae", width = "100%"),
    valueBoxOutput("success_rate", width = "100%")
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Egg Production by Species"),
      plotOutput("eggs_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Larvae Survival"),
      plotOutput("larvae_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Weight vs Egg Production"),
      plotOutput("weight_eggs_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Season Impact"),
      plotOutput("season_plot")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data <- egg_laying %>%
      filter(
        n_weights >= input$weight_range[1],
        n_weights <= input$weight_range[2],
        plant_id >= input$plant_range[1],
        plant_id <= input$plant_range[2]
      )
    
    if (input$species_filter != "All") {
      data <- data %>% filter(species == input$species_filter)
    }
    
    if (input$season_filter != "All") {
      data <- data %>% filter(season == input$season_filter)
    }
    
    data
  })
  
  # Value boxes
  output$avg_eggs <- renderValueBox({
    value_box(
      title = "Avg Eggs/Butterfly",
      value = round(mean(filtered_data()$n_eggs, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      theme = "primary"
    )
  })
  
  output$avg_larvae <- renderValueBox({
    value_box(
      title = "Avg Larvae Survival",
      value = round(mean(filtered_data()$larvae, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      theme = "success"
    )
  })
  
  output$success_rate <- renderValueBox({
    rate <- mean(filtered_data()$larvae / filtered_data()$n_eggs, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
    value_box(
      title = "Success Rate",
      value = paste0(round(rate, 1), "%"),
      theme = "info"
    )
  })
  
  # Plots
  output$eggs_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = species, y = n_eggs, fill = species)) +
      geom_boxplot() +
      labs(x = "Species", y = "Number of Eggs", fill = "Species") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$larvae_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = species, y = larvae, fill = species)) +
      geom_boxplot() +
      labs(x = "Species", y = "Larvae Survival", fill = "Species") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$weight_eggs_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = n_weights, y = n_eggs, color = species)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
      labs(x = "Weight", y = "Number of Eggs", color = "Species") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$season_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(season) %>%
      summarise(
        avg_eggs = mean(n_eggs, na.rm = TRUE),
        avg_larvae = mean(larvae, na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(avg_eggs, avg_larvae), 
                         names_to = "metric", 
                         values_to = "value") %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = season, y = value, fill = metric)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("avg_eggs" = "#4E79A7", "avg_larvae" = "#F28E2B"),
        labels = c("Avg Eggs", "Avg Larvae")
      ) +
      labs(x = "Season", y = "Average Count", fill = "Metric") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)


```
```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Create sample egg_laying data with important variables
set.seed(123)
egg_laying 

# Add survivability (larvae/n_eggs ratio, capped at 1)
egg_laying <- egg_laying %>%
  mutate(survivability = pmin(larvae / pmax(n_eggs, 1), 1))

# Custom theme
custom_theme <- bs_theme(
  version = 5,
  bg = "#FAFAFA",
  fg = "#2C3E50",
  primary = "#3498DB",
  secondary = "#95A5A6",
  base_font = font_google("Roboto"),
  heading_font = font_google("Roboto Slab"),
  font_scale = 0.95
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  theme = custom_theme,
  title = tags$div(
    style = "display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;",
    icon("butterfly"),
    "Lepidoptera Breeding Survivability Analysis System"
  ),
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 300,
    style = "background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ECF0F1, #FAFAFA);",
    tags$div(
      style = "padding: 10px; background: #3498DB; color: white; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 15px;",
      tags$h5(
        style = "margin: 0; font-weight: bold;",
        icon("filter"),
        "Data Filters"
      )
    ),
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      tags$div(icon("calendar-alt"), "Seasonal Period"),
      choices = c("All Seasons" = "all", "Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "all"
    ),
    hr(),
    tags$div(
      style = "background: #E8F4F8; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;",
      tags$strong(icon("thermometer-half"), "Environmental Parameters")
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_soil",
      "Soil Temperature (°C)",
      min = 0,
      max = 30,
      value = c(0, 30),
      step = 0.5
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_ambient",
      "Ambient Temperature (°C)",
      min = 0,
      max = 35,
      value = c(0, 35),
      step = 0.5
    ),
    hr(),
    tags$div(
      style = "background: #E8F8E8; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;",
      tags$strong(icon("leaf"), "Vegetation Metrics")
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "leaf_area",
      "Total Leaf Area (cm²)",
      min = 0,
      max = 300,
      value = c(0, 300),
      step = 5
    ),
    hr(),
    tags$div(
      style = "font-size: 0.85em; color: #7F8C8D; padding: 10px; background: #FFF; border-left: 3px solid #3498DB;",
      icon("info-circle"),
      " Active filters will dynamically update all visualizations and statistical analyses."
    )
  ),
  navset_card_underline(
    nav_panel(
      "Environmental Analysis",
      layout_columns(
        col_widths = c(6, 6),
        card(
          full_screen = TRUE,
          card_header(
            class = "bg-primary text-white",
            icon("temperature-high"),
            "Ambient Temperature vs Survivability"
          ),
          card_body(
            plotOutput("temp_ambient_plot", height = "400px")
          )
        ),
        card(
          full_screen = TRUE,
          card_header(
            class = "bg-success text-white",
            icon("calendar-week"),
            "Seasonal Survivability Distribution"
          ),
          card_body(
            plotOutput("season_plot", height = "400px")
          )
        )
      ),
      layout_columns(
        col_widths = c(6, 6),
        card(
          full_screen = TRUE,
          card_header(
            class = "bg-warning text-white",
            icon("seedling"),
            "Soil Temperature vs Survivability"
          ),
          card_body(
            plotOutput("temp_soil_plot", height = "400px")
          )
        ),
        card(
          full_screen = TRUE,
          card_header(
            class = "bg-info text-white",
            icon("leaf"),
            "Leaf Area vs Survivability"
          ),
          card_body(
            plotOutput("leaf_area_plot", height = "400px")
          )
        )
      )
    ),
    nav_panel(
      "Statistical Analysis",
      layout_columns(
        col_widths = c(7, 5),
        card(
          full_screen = TRUE,
          card_header(
            class = "bg-danger text-white",
            icon("chart-bar"),
            "Correlation Matrix - Environmental Variables"
          ),
          card_body(
            plotOutput("correlation_plot", height = "500px")
          )
        ),
        card(
          card_header(
            class = "bg-dark text-white",
            icon("chart-line"),
            "Optimal Conditions Profile"
          ),
          card_body(
            verbatimTextOutput("optimal_conditions")
          )
        )
      ),
      layout_columns(
        col_widths = c(4, 4, 4),
        value_box(
          title = "Total Observations",
          value = textOutput("n_obs"),
          showcase = icon("database"),
          theme = "primary"
        ),
        value_box(
          title = "Mean Survivability",
          value = textOutput("mean_surv"),
          showcase = icon("chart-line"),
          theme = "success"
        ),
        value_box(
          title = "Occupancy Rate",
          value = textOutput("occ_rate"),
          showcase = icon("home"),
          theme = "info"
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data <- egg_laying
    
    # Filter by season
    if (input$season != "all") {
      data <- data %>% filter(season == input$season)
    }
    
    # Filter by temperature ranges and leaf area
    data %>%
      filter(
        temperature_soil >= input$temp_soil[1],
        temperature_soil <= input$temp_soil[2],
        temperature_ambient >= input$temp_ambient[1],
        temperature_ambient <= input$temp_ambient[2],
        total_leaf_area >= input$leaf_area[1],
        total_leaf_area <= input$leaf_area[2]
      )
  })
  
  # Value boxes
  output$n_obs <- renderText({
    format(nrow(filtered_data()), big.mark = ",")
  })
  
  output$mean_surv <- renderText({
    paste0(round(mean(filtered_data()$survivability, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), "%")
  })
  
  output$occ_rate <- renderText({
    paste0(round(mean(filtered_data()$occupied, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1), "%")
  })
  
  output$temp_ambient_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_ambient, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 3, shape = 16) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.5, alpha = 0.2) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ECC71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Ambient Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Survivability Ratio (Larvae/Eggs)",
        subtitle = "Linear regression with 95% confidence interval"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", size = 10),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90"),
        legend.position = "top"
      )
  }, res = 96)
  
  output$season_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = season, y = survivability, fill = season)) +
      geom_violin(alpha = 0.6, trim = FALSE) +
      geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.8, outlier.shape = 21, outlier.size = 2) +
      stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ECC71")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Seasonal Period",
        y = "Survivability Ratio (Larvae/Eggs)",
        subtitle = "Violin plots with overlaid boxplots; white diamond = mean"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", size = 10),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      )
  }, res = 96)
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 3, shape = 16) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.5, alpha = 0.2) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#2ECC71"),
        name = "Season"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Survivability Ratio (Larvae/Eggs)",
        subtitle = "Linear regression with 95% confidence interval"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", size = 10),
```

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample egg_laying data with important variables
set.seed(123)
egg_laying <- data.frame(
  season = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 300, replace = TRUE),
  n_eggs = rpois(300, lambda = 5),
  larvae = rpois(300, lambda = 3),
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 300, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(300, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(300, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  total_leaf_area = rnorm(300, mean = 150, sd = 40),
  sward_height = rnorm(300, mean = 15, sd = 5),
  plant_area = rnorm(300, mean = 200, sd = 60)
)

# Add survivability (larvae/n_eggs ratio, capped at 1)
egg_laying <- egg_laying %>%
  mutate(survivability = pmin(larvae / pmax(n_eggs, 1), 1))

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Butterfly Breeding Survivability",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("All" = "all", "Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "all"
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_soil",
      "Soil Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 30,
      value = c(0, 30),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_ambient",
      "Ambient Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 35,
      value = c(0, 35),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "leaf_area",
      "Total Leaf Area Range (cm²):",
      min = 0,
      max = 300,
      value = c(0, 300),
      step = 10
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Ambient Temperature vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("temp_ambient_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Survivability by Season"),
      plotOutput("season_plot")
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Soil Temperature vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("temp_soil_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Leaf Area vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("leaf_area_plot")
    )
  )

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data <- egg_laying
    
    # Filter by season
    if (input$season != "all") {
      data <- data %>% filter(season == input$season)
    }
    
    # Filter by temperature ranges and leaf area
    data %>%
      filter(
        temperature_soil >= input$temp_soil[1],
        temperature_soil <= input$temp_soil[2],
        temperature_ambient >= input$temp_ambient[1],
        temperature_ambient <= input$temp_ambient[2],
        total_leaf_area >= input$leaf_area[1],
        total_leaf_area <= input$leaf_area[2]
      )
  })
  
  
  output$temp_ambient_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_ambient, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Ambient Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$season_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = season, y = survivability, fill = season)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Season",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$leaf_area_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = total_leaf_area, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Total Leaf Area (cm²)",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$model_summary <- renderPrint({
    model <- lm_model()
    data <- filtered_data()
    
    cat("Linear Regression Model: Survivability Prediction\n")
    cat("==================================================\n\n")
    cat("Formula: survivability ~ season + temperature_ambient + temperature_soil + total_leaf_area\n\n")
    cat("Sample size:", nrow(data), "\n\n")
    
    print(summary(model))
    
    cat("\n\nKey Insights:\n")
    cat("-------------\n")
    cat("R-squared:", round(summary(model)$r.squared, 4), "\n")
    cat("Adjusted R-squared:", round(summary(model)$adj.r.squared, 4), "\n")
    cat("\nMean survivability:", round(mean(data$survivability), 3), "\n")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample egg_laying data with important variables
set.seed(123)
egg_laying <- data.frame(
  species = sample(c("Peacock", "Red Admiral", "Small Tortoiseshell"), 300, replace = TRUE),
  season = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 300, replace = TRUE),
  n_eggs = rpois(300, lambda = 5),
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 300, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(300, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(300, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  total_leaf_area = rnorm(300, mean = 150, sd = 40),
  sward_height = rnorm(300, mean = 15, sd = 5),
  plant_area = rnorm(300, mean = 200, sd = 60)
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Butterfly Breeding Explorer",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    selectInput(
      "species",
      "Select Species:",
      choices = c("All", "Peacock", "Red Admiral", "Small Tortoiseshell"),
      selected = "All"
    ),
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("All" = "all", "Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "all"
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_soil",
      "Soil Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 30,
      value = c(0, 30),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_ambient",
      "Ambient Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 35,
      value = c(0, 35),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "leaf_area",
      "Total Leaf Area Range (cm²):",
      min = 0,
      max = 300,
      value = c(0, 300),
      step = 10
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Egg Count by Species"),
      plotOutput("egg_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Occupancy Distribution"),
      plotOutput("occupancy_plot")
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Soil Temperature vs Eggs"),
      plotOutput("temp_soil_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Leaf Area vs Eggs"),
      plotOutput("leaf_area_plot")
    )
  ),
  card(
    card_header("Data Summary"),
    verbatimTextOutput("summary_text")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data <- egg_laying
    
    # Filter by species
    if (input$species != "All") {
      data <- data %>% filter(species == input$species)
    }
    
    # Filter by season
    if (input$season != "all") {
      data <- data %>% filter(season == input$season)
    }
    
    # Filter by temperature ranges and leaf area
    data %>%
      filter(
        temperature_soil >= input$temp_soil[1],
        temperature_soil <= input$temp_soil[2],
        temperature_ambient >= input$temp_ambient[1],
        temperature_ambient <= input$temp_ambient[2],
        total_leaf_area >= input$leaf_area[1],
        total_leaf_area <= input$leaf_area[2]
      )
  })
  
  output$egg_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = species, y = n_eggs, fill = species)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("Peacock" = "#4B0082", "Red Admiral" = "#DC143C", 
                   "Small Tortoiseshell" = "#FF8C00")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Species",
        y = "Number of Eggs",
        fill = "Species"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$occupancy_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      mutate(occupied = factor(occupied, labels = c("Unoccupied", "Occupied"))) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = occupied, fill = season)) +
      geom_bar(color = "black", position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Occupancy Status",
        y = "Count",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, y = n_eggs, color = species)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("Peacock" = "#4B0082", "Red Admiral" = "#DC143C", 
                   "Small Tortoiseshell" = "#FF8C00")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Number of Eggs",
        color = "Species"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$leaf_area_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = total_leaf_area, y = n_eggs, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Total Leaf Area (cm²)",
        y = "Number of Eggs",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$summary_text <- renderPrint({
    data <- filtered_data()
    cat("Filtered Data Summary\n")
    cat("====================\n\n")
    cat("Total observations:", nrow(data), "\n\n")
    cat("Average eggs per site:", round(mean(data$n_eggs), 2), "\n")
    cat("Occupancy rate:", round(mean(data$occupied) * 100, 1), "%\n\n")
    cat("Temperature ranges:\n")
    cat("  Soil:", round(range(data$temperature_soil), 1), "°C\n")
    cat("  Ambient:", round(range(data$temperature_ambient), 1), "°C\n\n")
    cat("Species breakdown:\n")
    print(table(data$species))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```



```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Assumes you have already loaded your data as egg_laying
# If not, uncomment and modify the line below:
# egg_laying <- read.csv("your_data_file.csv")

# For demonstration, creating sample data structure
# Replace this with your actual egg_laying dataset

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "🦋 Butterfly Breeding Optimizer",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    h4("Breeding Parameters"),
    sliderInput(
      "weight_range",
      "Weight Range:",
      min = floor(min(egg_laying$n_weights)),
      max = ceiling(max(egg_laying$n_weights)),
      value = c(floor(min(egg_laying$n_weights)), ceiling(max(egg_laying$n_weights))),
      step = 1
    ),
    selectInput(
      "species_filter",
      "Species:",
      choices = c("All", unique(egg_laying$species)),
      selected = "All"
    ),
    selectInput(
      "season_filter",
      "Season:",
      choices = c("All", unique(egg_laying$season)),
      selected = "All"
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "plant_range",
      "Plant ID Range:",
      min = min(egg_laying$plant_id),
      max = max(egg_laying$plant_id),
      value = c(min(egg_laying$plant_id), max(egg_laying$plant_id)),
      step = 1
    ),
    hr(),
    h4("Optimization Metrics"),
    valueBoxOutput("avg_eggs", width = "100%"),
    valueBoxOutput("avg_larvae", width = "100%"),
    valueBoxOutput("success_rate", width = "100%")
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Egg Production by Species"),
      plotOutput("eggs_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Larvae Survival"),
      plotOutput("larvae_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Weight vs Egg Production"),
      plotOutput("weight_eggs_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Season Impact"),
      plotOutput("season_plot")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data <- egg_laying %>%
      filter(
        n_weights >= input$weight_range[1],
        n_weights <= input$weight_range[2],
        plant_id >= input$plant_range[1],
        plant_id <= input$plant_range[2]
      )
    
    if (input$species_filter != "All") {
      data <- data %>% filter(species == input$species_filter)
    }
    
    if (input$season_filter != "All") {
      data <- data %>% filter(season == input$season_filter)
    }
    
    data
  })
  
  # Value boxes
  output$avg_eggs <- renderValueBox({
    value_box(
      title = "Avg Eggs/Butterfly",
      value = round(mean(filtered_data()$n_eggs, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      theme = "primary"
    )
  })
  
  output$avg_larvae <- renderValueBox({
    value_box(
      title = "Avg Larvae Survival",
      value = round(mean(filtered_data()$larvae, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      theme = "success"
    )
  })
  
  output$success_rate <- renderValueBox({
    rate <- mean(filtered_data()$larvae / filtered_data()$n_eggs, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
    value_box(
      title = "Success Rate",
      value = paste0(round(rate, 1), "%"),
      theme = "info"
    )
  })
  
  # Plots
  output$eggs_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = species, y = n_eggs, fill = species)) +
      geom_boxplot() +
      labs(x = "Species", y = "Number of Eggs", fill = "Species") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$larvae_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = species, y = larvae, fill = species)) +
      geom_boxplot() +
      labs(x = "Species", y = "Larvae Survival", fill = "Species") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$weight_eggs_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = n_weights, y = n_eggs, color = species)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
      labs(x = "Weight", y = "Number of Eggs", color = "Species") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$season_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(season) %>%
      summarise(
        avg_eggs = mean(n_eggs, na.rm = TRUE),
        avg_larvae = mean(larvae, na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(avg_eggs, avg_larvae), 
                         names_to = "metric", 
                         values_to = "value") %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = season, y = value, fill = metric)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("avg_eggs" = "#4E79A7", "avg_larvae" = "#F28E2B"),
        labels = c("Avg Eggs", "Avg Larvae")
      ) +
      labs(x = "Season", y = "Average Count", fill = "Metric") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```


```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Create sample data that matches your structure
set.seed(123)
plant_joined <- data.frame(
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 200, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(200, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(200, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  season.x = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 200, replace = TRUE)
)

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Plant Data Correlations",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    selectInput(
      "x_var",
      "X-axis Variable:",
      choices = c(
        "Occupied" = "occupied",
        "Soil Temperature" = "temperature_soil",
        "Ambient Temperature" = "temperature_ambient"
      ),
      selected = "temperature_soil"
    ),
    selectInput(
      "y_var",
      "Y-axis Variable:",
      choices = c(
        "Occupied" = "occupied",
        "Soil Temperature" = "temperature_soil",
        "Ambient Temperature" = "temperature_ambient"
      ),
      selected = "temperature_ambient"
    ),
    checkboxInput(
      "color_by_season",
      "Color by Season",
      value = TRUE
    ),
    checkboxInput(
      "add_smooth",
      "Add Trend Line",
      value = TRUE
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Correlation Plot"),
      plotOutput("correlation_plot", height = "500px")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Correlation Matrix"),
      plotOutput("correlation_matrix", height = "500px")
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Autumn Correlations"),
      plotOutput("autumn_pairs", height = "400px")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Spring Correlations"),
      plotOutput("spring_pairs", height = "400px")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Main correlation plot
  output$correlation_plot <- renderPlot({
    p <- plant_joined %>% 
      ggplot(aes_string(x = input$x_var, y = input$y_var))
    
    if (input$color_by_season) {
      p <- p + 
        geom_point(aes(color = season.x), alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
        scale_color_manual(
          values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90"),
          name = "Season"
        )
    } else {
      p <- p + geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3)
    }
    
    if (input$add_smooth) {
      if (input$color_by_season) {
        p <- p + geom_smooth(aes(color = season.x), method = "lm", se = TRUE)
      } else {
        p <- p + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue")
      }
    }
    
    p + 
      labs(
        x = names(which(c(
          "occupied" = "Occupied",
          "temperature_soil" = "Soil Temperature",
          "temperature_ambient" = "Ambient Temperature"
        ) == input$x_var)),
        y = names(which(c(
          "occupied" = "Occupied",
          "temperature_soil" = "Soil Temperature",
          "temperature_ambient" = "Ambient Temperature"
        ) == input$y_var))
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 14))
  })
  
  # Correlation matrix heatmap
  output$correlation_matrix <- renderPlot({
    # Calculate correlation matrix
    cor_data <- plant_joined %>%
      select(occupied, temperature_soil, temperature_ambient) %>%
      cor()
    
    # Convert to long format for ggplot
    cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_data))
    names(cor_long) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "Correlation")
    
    # Create labels
    var_labels <- c(
      "occupied" = "Occupied",
      "temperature_soil" = "Soil Temp",
      "temperature_ambient" = "Ambient Temp"
    )
    
    cor_long$Var1 <- factor(cor_long$Var1, 
                            levels = c("occupied", "temperature_soil", "temperature_ambient"),
                            labels = var_labels)
    cor_long$Var2 <- factor(cor_long$Var2, 
                            levels = c("occupied", "temperature_soil", "temperature_ambient"),
                            labels = var_labels)
    
    ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Correlation)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white") +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(Correlation, 2)), size = 6) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#0571b0", 
        mid = "white", 
        high = "#ca0020",
        midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-1, 1)
      ) +
      labs(x = "", y = "") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
  })
  
  # Autumn pairs plot
  output$autumn_pairs <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>%
      filter(season.x == "autumn") %>%
      select(occupied, temperature_soil, temperature_ambient) %>%
      GGally::ggpairs(
        title = "Autumn Season",
        upper = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("cor", size = 5)),
        lower = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("points", alpha = 0.5, color = "#D2691E")),
        diag = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("densityDiag", fill = "#D2691E", alpha = 0.5))
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })
  
  # Spring pairs plot
  output$spring_pairs <- renderPlot({
    plant_joined %>%
      filter(season.x == "spring") %>%
      select(occupied, temperature_soil, temperature_ambient) %>%
      GGally::ggpairs(
        title = "Spring Season",
        upper = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("cor", size = 5)),
        lower = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("points", alpha = 0.5, color = "#90EE90")),
        diag = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("densityDiag", fill = "#90EE90", alpha = 0.5))
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```
```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Create sample egg_laying data with important variables
set.seed(123)
egg_laying <- data.frame(
  season = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 300, replace = TRUE),
  n_eggs = rpois(300, lambda = 5),
  larvae = rpois(300, lambda = 3),
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 300, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(300, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(300, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  total_leaf_area = rnorm(300, mean = 150, sd = 40),
  sward_height = rnorm(300, mean = 15, sd = 5),
  plant_area = rnorm(300, mean = 200, sd = 60)
)

# Add survivability (larvae/n_eggs ratio, capped at 1)
egg_laying <- egg_laying %>%
  mutate(survivability = pmin(larvae / pmax(n_eggs, 1), 1))

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Butterfly Breeding Survivability",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("All" = "all", "Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "all"
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_soil",
      "Soil Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 30,
      value = c(0, 30),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_ambient",
      "Ambient Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 35,
      value = c(0, 35),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "leaf_area",
      "Total Leaf Area Range (cm²):",
      min = 0,
      max = 300,
      value = c(0, 300),
      step = 10
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Ambient Temperature vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("temp_ambient_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Survivability by Season"),
      plotOutput("season_plot")
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Soil Temperature vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("temp_soil_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Leaf Area vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("leaf_area_plot")
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Temperature Correlation Heatmap"),
      plotOutput("correlation_plot")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Optimal Conditions Analysis"),
      verbatimTextOutput("optimal_conditions")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    data <- egg_laying
    
    # Filter by season
    if (input$season != "all") {
      data <- data %>% filter(season == input$season)
    }
    
    # Filter by temperature ranges and leaf area
    data %>%
      filter(
        temperature_soil >= input$temp_soil[1],
        temperature_soil <= input$temp_soil[2],
        temperature_ambient >= input$temp_ambient[1],
        temperature_ambient <= input$temp_ambient[2],
        total_leaf_area >= input$leaf_area[1],
        total_leaf_area <= input$leaf_area[2]
      )
  })
  
  output$temp_ambient_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_ambient, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Ambient Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$season_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = season, y = survivability, fill = season)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Season",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        fill = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$temp_soil_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temperature_soil, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Soil Temperature (°C)",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$leaf_area_plot <- renderPlot({
    filtered_data() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = total_leaf_area, y = survivability, color = season)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c("autumn" = "#D2691E", "spring" = "#90EE90")
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "Total Leaf Area (cm²)",
        y = "Survivability (Larvae/Eggs)",
        color = "Season"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
  })
  
  output$correlation_plot <- renderPlot({
    data <- filtered_data() %>%
      select(survivability, temperature_soil, temperature_ambient, total_leaf_area, sward_height)
    
    cor_matrix <- cor(data, use = "complete.obs")
    
    cor_data <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
    names(cor_data) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "Correlation")
    
    ggplot(cor_data, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Correlation)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white") +
      scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166AC", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B",
                           midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1)) +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(Correlation, 2)), size = 3) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
            text = element_text(size = 10)) +
      labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Correlation")
  })
  
  output$optimal_conditions <- renderPrint({
    data <- filtered_data()
    
    # Find conditions with highest survivability
    high_survival <- data %>%
      filter(survivability > quantile(survivability, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    cat("Optimal Conditions for High Survivability\n")
    cat("==========================================\n\n")
    cat("Filtered dataset size:", nrow(data), "observations\n")
    cat("High survivability observations (top 25%):", nrow(high_survival), "\n\n")
    
    cat("Overall Statistics:\n")
    cat("-------------------\n")
    cat("Mean survivability:", round(mean(data$survivability, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
    cat("Median survivability:", round(median(data$survivability, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n\n")
    
    cat("Optimal Conditions (Top 25% Survivability):\n")
    cat("-------------------------------------------\n")
    cat("Ambient Temperature: ", 
        round(mean(high_survival$temperature_ambient), 1), "°C",
        " (", round(min(high_survival$temperature_ambient), 1), "-", 
        round(max(high_survival$temperature_ambient), 1), "°C)\n", sep = "")
    cat("Soil Temperature: ", 
        round(mean(high_survival$temperature_soil), 1), "°C",
        " (", round(min(high_survival$temperature_soil), 1), "-", 
        round(max(high_survival$temperature_soil), 1), "°C)\n", sep = "")
    cat("Leaf Area: ", 
        round(mean(high_survival$total_leaf_area), 1), "cm²",
        " (", round(min(high_survival$total_leaf_area), 1), "-", 
        round(max(high_survival$total_leaf_area), 1), "cm²)\n\n", sep = "")
    
    cat("Season Distribution (High Survivability):\n")
    print(table(high_survival$season))
    
    cat("\n\nOccupancy Rate (High Survivability):\n")
    cat(round(mean(high_survival$occupied) * 100, 1), "%\n")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
```{r}
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Create sample egg_laying data with important variables
set.seed(123)
egg_laying <- data.frame(
  season = sample(c("autumn", "spring"), 300, replace = TRUE),
  n_eggs = rpois(300, lambda = 5),
  larvae = rpois(300, lambda = 3),
  occupied = sample(c(0, 1), 300, replace = TRUE),
  temperature_soil = rnorm(300, mean = 18, sd = 4),
  temperature_ambient = rnorm(300, mean = 20, sd = 5),
  total_leaf_area = rnorm(300, mean = 150, sd = 40),
  sward_height = rnorm(300, mean = 15, sd = 5),
  plant_area = rnorm(300, mean = 200, sd = 60)
)

# Add survivability (larvae/n_eggs ratio, capped at 1)
egg_laying <- egg_laying %>%
  mutate(survivability = pmin(larvae / pmax(n_eggs, 1), 1))

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Butterfly Breeding Survivability",
  fillable = FALSE,
  sidebar = sidebar(
    radioButtons(
      "season",
      "Select Season:",
      choices = c("All" = "all", "Autumn" = "autumn", "Spring" = "spring"),
      selected = "all"
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_soil",
      "Soil Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 30,
      value = c(0, 30),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "temp_ambient",
      "Ambient Temperature Range (°C):",
      min = 0,
      max = 35,
      value = c(0, 35),
      step = 1
    ),
    sliderInput(
      "leaf_area",
      "Total Leaf Area Range (cm²):",
      min = 0,
      max = 300,
      value = c(0, 300),
      step = 10
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Ambient Temperature vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("temp_ambient_plot", height = "400px")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Survivability by Season"),
      plotOutput("season_plot", height = "400px")
    )
  ),
  layout_columns(
    card(
      card_header("Soil Temperature vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("temp_soil_plot", height = "400px")
    ),
    card(
      card_header("Leaf Area vs Survivability"),
      plotOutput("leaf_area_plot", height = "400px")
    )
  ),
  card(
    full_screen = TRUE,
    card_header("Complete Correlation Matrix"),
    plotOutput("correlation_plot", height = "600px")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive filtered data
